untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) impending large dividend events, (2) option pricing vs intrinsic value comparison, and (3) secondary market option discount measurement. None of these can be expressed using the allowed price/technical indicators. Dividend announcement data, option chain data (strike, expiry, bid-ask), and implied vs intrinsic value calculations are required but not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally event-driven and requires corporate action data (dividend announcements) and options market data (option prices, strikes, Greeks) that are outside the scope of price-based technical indicators. A backtest engine using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators cannot mechanically detect dividend events or compare option pricing to intrinsic value.
